Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.

  • Uses of UriResolver in org.apache.juneau.rest.server

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server that return UriResolver
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    UriResolver
    RestRequest.getUriResolver()
    Shortcut for calling RestRequest.getUriResolver() using UriResolution.ROOT_RELATIVE and UriRelativity.RESOURCE
    UriResolver
    RestRequest.getUriResolver(UriResolution resolution, UriRelativity relativity)
    Returns a URI resolver that can be used to convert URIs to absolute or root-relative form.
